error_signature: campaign_id not included in Facebook Lead Ads trigger
title: Missing campaign ID in Facebook Lead Ads trigger response
symptom: The Facebook Lead Ads trigger does not return the campaign ID in the webhook response, leading to incomplete data extraction.
applies_when: Expecting campaign details in the response
not_this_if: Campaign details are available in the CSV download
root_cause: The Facebook Lead Ads trigger is designed to only return ad and adset information in its webhook response, omitting the campaign ID. This is a limitation of the trigger's current implementation.
fix_steps: Use the adset.id from the trigger response
Make a GET request to the Graph API endpoint /{{adset.id}}?fields=campaign{id,name}
Extract the campaign details from the API response
agent_instruction: Retrieve the campaign details using the adset ID from the trigger response via the Graph API.
